task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into FreeMED.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the FreeMED dashboard or home screen indicating a successful login (using admin/admin).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the ICD-10-CM or Diagnosis Codes library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screen, menu selection, or module titled 'ICD Codes', 'Diagnosis Codes', 'Billing Codes', or similar within the FreeMED interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the form to add a new ICD code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Add', 'New', or blank entry form specifically designed for inputting a new ICD/Diagnosis code.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct ICD code was entered into the form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'G47.33' typed into the code input field of the form.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct description was entered into the form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Obstructive sleep apnea (adult)(pediatric)' typed into the description or name input field of the form.

task_completion.description: Verify the new ICD code entry was saved to the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save' or 'Submit' button being clicked, followed by a success notification, or the new code 'G47.33' appearing as a saved entry in the system-wide library list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the FreeMED graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is using a web browser to navigate FreeMED, rather than executing terminal commands, curl requests, or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered data into the actual FreeMED application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the code and description are typed directly into FreeMED's web form fields, not into a separate text editor, notepad, or terminal window.

integrity.description: Verify the final result appears to be a genuine state of the FreeMED software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that any success messages or library lists showing the new code are rendered within the standard FreeMED UI layout and do not appear to be mocked or edited HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected ICD code is exactly 'G47.33'. The expected description must contain 'obstructive sleep apnea' (specifically 'Obstructive sleep apnea (adult)(pediatric)'). This is a verified, standard real-world code from the Official ICD-10-CM 2024 code set (CMS).
